items.title: Fever allowed a season-high 113pts in 113-95 loss in Atlanta. They've yielded 100+ in 5 of 7 losses this season.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever allowed a season-high 113pts in 113-95 loss in Atlanta. They've yielded 100+ in 5 of 7 losses this season.

Clark had 26/7a, Mitchell with 16 (all in first half). Dream +20 in paint. Bad disposition most of the game.

Next: 3 in a row at home - Mon. v PHX

items.title: As tough as the offense and fouls have been, Fever just not getting stops. It's defense again. They've allowed five straight layups.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
As tough as the offense and fouls have been, Fever just not getting stops. It's defense again. They've allowed five straight layups.

White calls timeout after Dream open up 20-point lead. They have controlled the second half.

items.title: It was a costly 2Q for the Fever last matchup. This time, it was the 3Q. Outscored by 13.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
It was a costly 2Q for the Fever last matchup. This time, it was the 3Q. Outscored by 13.

Had 10 TOs to just six FGs. Just two FTs. And fouls are a major concern as Boston already has 5. A questionable fifth.

Dream +10 entering the 4th. Clark has 23pts, but 7TOs.

items.title: June 20, 1993: Scottie Pippen drives and dunks on Charles Barkley in Game 6 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 20, 1993: Scottie Pippen drives and dunks on Charles Barkley in Game 6 of the NBA Finals.

Pippen had 23 PTS/12 REB/5 AST/4 STL and Michael Jordan had 33 PTS/8 REB/7 AST in the Bulls' 99-98 win over the Phoenix Suns that earned Chicago its third-straight NBA Championship.

items.title: Another offensive showcase in the first half, Fever leading 59-56. Shooting 61%, including 9 for 15 from deep.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Another offensive showcase in the first half, Fever leading 59-56. Shooting 61%, including 9 for 15 from deep.

Mitchell has 16pts, Clark with 15.  Dream with 12-0 adv. in second-chance points.

It's also been physical, full of fouls. Nine of 10 starters have 2+ fouls.
